text: A bed sitting next to a large window and a table with two chairs.
Dog running in water chasing red flying disc.
A desk with sticky notes and a computer on it
A white three story building with a clock at the top.
A street with a motorcycle parked in front of a store that has a kayak rack on the side.
A laptop sitting on a desk with someone touching the bottom of it.
A man standing in a doorway where umbrellas are hanging upside down.
A few people are attending an aviation museum event.
There are a group of elephants under the tree
The man walks through a snow trail wearing skis.
